title: Sajtmaskin tier-3 SDK deny-list
description: Strict schema for config/integrations/tier3-sdk-deny.json — the F2 (design-stage) deny-list of tier-3 backend SDKs. Runtime authority is src/lib/integrations/tier3-sdk-deny.ts (hand-parses + enforces non-empty categories/modules and cross-category module uniqueness). This schema mirrors that contract structurally; the cross-category uniqueness invariant is asserted by tier3-sdk-deny.schema.test.ts (JSON Schema cannot express it).

_meta.description: Free-form documentation block (purpose + consumers). Not read by runtime.

categories.description: One entry per deny-list category. Drives both the autofix matcher (flat module list) and the F2 design-stage contract prompt block (one bullet per category).

label.description: Human-readable category label (e.g. "Payments"). Rendered as one prompt bullet.

modules.description: npm module specifiers denied in F2 for this category. Must be non-empty and unique within the category (cross-category uniqueness is asserted by the test).
